rows.name: facilitator_message_one_child
rows.value:
**Thanks @fields.user_name.**

Can you tell me more about your child?

rows.name: facilitator_message_multiple_children
rows.value:
**Thanks @fields.user_name.**

To get started, let's focus on the child you have the most challenges with so I can give you the right guidance for their age.

rows.name: question_child_name
rows.value: ¿Cómo se llama tu niña, niño o adolescente?

rows.name: question_child_age
rows.value: ¿Cuántos años tiene tu niña, niño o adolescente?

rows.name: child_age_input_restriction
rows.value: @global.app_name only supports parents of children between 2 and 17.
